name: code.score_report
description: Evaluate a Markdown report against quality criteria and return a score (0-100) with itemised feedback. Score >= 70 means passed.

markdown.description: The Markdown report text to evaluate.

code:
import json, sys
args = json.load(sys.stdin)
md = args.get('markdown', '')
score = 0
feedback = []
criteria = [
    (20, '# ' in md,          'Has a top-level title (# heading)'),
    (20, '## ' in md,         'Has section headings (## headings)'),
    (25, '|' in md,           'Contains a data table'),
    (20, 'Summary' in md,     'Has a Summary section'),
    (15, len(md.strip()) > 200, 'Report is sufficiently detailed (>200 chars)'),
]
for pts, passed, msg in criteria:
    if passed:
        score += pts
        feedback.append(f'[PASS +{pts}] {msg}')
    else:
        feedback.append(f'[FAIL  +0] {msg}')
result = {'score': score, 'feedback': feedback, 'passed': score >= 70}
print(json.dumps({'ok': True, 'data': result}))
